allow:
Bash(echo "=== Final Syntax Check ===" && \\
for f in src/agents/models/mcp.client.js src/agents/models/llm.client.js src/agents/models/chat.session.js src/agents/models/model.factory.js src/agents/react.agent.js src/agents/utils/logger.js; do
  node --check "$f" 2>&1 && echo "✓ $f" || echo "✗ $f FAILED"
done)

Bash(echo "=== Project Structure ===" && echo "" && \\
echo "." && \\
ls -1 *.md *.json .env.example .gitignore 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/├── /' && echo "" && \\
echo "bin/" && ls -1 bin/ | sed 's/^/├── /' && echo "" && \\
echo "docs/" && ls -1 docs/ | sed 's/^/├── /' && echo "" && \\
echo "src/" && \\
echo "├── agents/" && ls -1 src/agents/*.js 2>/dev/null | sed 's|src/agents/|│   ├── |' && \\
echo "│   ├── models/" && ls -1 src/agents/models/*.js | sed 's|src/agents/models/|│   │   ├── |' && \\
echo "│   ├── tools/" && ls -1 src/agents/tools/*.js | sed 's|src/agents/tools/|│   │   ├── |' && \\
echo "│   └── utils/" && ls -1 src/agents/utils/*.js | sed 's|src/agents/utils/|│   │   ├── |' && \\
echo "├── skills/" && ls -1 src/skills/*.js | sed 's|src/skills/|│   ├── |' && \\
echo "│   └── builtin/" && ls -1 src/skills/builtin/*.json | sed 's|src/skills/builtin/|│   │   ├── |' && \\
echo "└── index.js" && echo "" && \\
echo "examples/" && ls -1 examples/*.js 2>/dev/null | head -5 | sed 's/^/├── /' && echo "└── ..." && echo "" && \\
echo "test/" && ls -1 test/*.js 2>/dev/null | head -3 | sed 's/^/├── /' && echo "└── ...")
Bash(printf '/load examples/browser-automation.skill.md\\n/list\\n你好，请介绍一下 browser automation 技能\\n/exit\\n' | npm run cli)
